response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack software engineer with strong web, mobile, and some embedded/DLang background, but the resume shows no evidence of the core requirements for this role: SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator architecture, deep-learning workload optimization, GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture, or hardware-software co-design. The profile is mismatched with a Principal Performance Architect position focused on cloud AI hardware.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) of senior software engineering across diverse stacks
Some low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Exposure to embedded/hardware-adjacent work (robotic arms, LabWindows/CVI at NI)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator, or hardware architecture experience
No deep-learning training/inference optimization or GPU workload analysis background
Educational path (BS + extensive experience) is acceptable but not paired with the required hardware/ML specialization

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI accelerator / SoC modeling experience
No GPU / SIMD-MIMD / DNN optimization background
